items.title: Foley Obtains Dismissal in Medicare Advantage Marketing FCA Case - Foley & Lardner LLP
items.reason: A Medicare Advantage marketing False Claims Act (FCA) case dismissal involving a payer directly implicates CMS enforcement and regulatory action against insurers, which is core to the payer litigation and enforcement topic.
items.summary: Foley & Lardner LLP obtained a dismissal in a Medicare Advantage marketing False Claims Act case. While the excerpt does not specify the defendant payer, the case name, or detailed allegations, a Medicare Advantage FCA dismissal represents a significant enforcement or litigation development affecting payers and their marketing practices under CMS regulatory authority. This is material to revenue-cycle teams because MA marketing compliance and FCA exposure directly impact payer policies that filter through to provider billing and claims handling.
